headline: Is Verizon’s 5G Vehicle-Safety Push Hinting at a Deeper Edge-Computing Strategy for VZ?
summary: Aptiv PLC and Wind River recently unveiled a proof-of-concept in partnership with Verizon’s 5G and edge-compute powered Edge Transportation Exchange platform, showing how vehicles can share sensor data over mobile networks to support advanced safety features like automatic emergency braking. This collaboration highlights how Verizon’s network and mobile edge infrastructure can act as a cloud-based coordination layer for cross-manufacturer connected-vehicle services that use commonly...
